assertions.title: First-visit journey end-to-end

steps.expected: Landing page with hero and CTA

steps.action: Fill signup form with email and password

steps.observed: No plans shown - 'No plans yet' message displayed

evidence.network: POST /api/chat -> rate limited, AI response eventually streamed

assertions.issues: Plan generation works but plans are not persisting to the dashboard. AI generates a response with semester grid, but the plan is not saved and does not appear on /dashboard.

assertions.title: Data persistence across sessions

steps.observed: AI generated content but plan not saved
Dashboard shows 'No plans yet' - no persistence

assertions.issues: Plans are not being persisted to the database. AI generates content but the plan is not saved, so there is nothing to persist across sessions.

assertions.title: Recovery persistence across sessions

steps.action: Create plan and mark course as failed
steps.expected: Plan created, course marked failed, AI recovery triggered

evidence.network: Rate limit error: 'Rate limited, try again in a moment'

assertions.issues: Cannot test due to OpenRouter rate limit (20 req/min, 50 req/day). Previous attempts exhausted the rate limit.

assertions.title: Multiple plans management

steps.expected: Plan A saved and visible on dashboard
Plan B saved, both visible on dashboard
Each plan shows correct data when clicked

assertions.issues: Blocked by plan persistence issue (VAL-CROSS-005). Without plans being saved, cannot test multiple plan management.

frictions.description: OpenRouter free tier has very restrictive rate limits (20 req/min, 50 req/day). Testing multiple assertions that require AI generation quickly exhausts the quota.
frictions.resolution: Had to wait between tests, still hit rate limit

frictions.description: Plans are not persisting to the database after AI generation. The AI generates semester-by-semester plans but they don't appear on /dashboard.
frictions.resolution: Core issue blocking VAL-CROSS-005, VAL-CROSS-006, VAL-CROSS-007

blockers.description: Plan persistence not working - AI generates content but plans not saved to database
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Multiple attempts to create plans with different paths (SMC→UCLA CS, De Anza→UC Davis CS). None persisted to dashboard.

blockers.description: OpenRouter API rate limit (20 req/min, 50 req/day) blocking further AI-dependent tests
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Waited 25s between requests, still rate limited

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 0 passed, 2 failed, 2 blocked. VAL-CROSS-001 failed due to plan persistence issue. VAL-CROSS-005 failed as plans don't persist across sessions. VAL-CROSS-006 blocked by rate limit. VAL-CROSS-007 blocked by persistence issue. The core issue is that AI-generated plans are not being saved to the database, preventing all persistence-related assertions from passing.
